---
title: JSX Attribute Tests
---

import { Component } from './Component'

# String Attributes

<Component name="double quoted" />

<Component name='single quoted' />

<Component name="with \"escaped\" quotes" />

<Component name='with \'escaped\' quotes' />

<Component name="" />

<Component name="multi word value with spaces" />

# Boolean Attributes

<Component disabled />

<Component hidden readOnly autoFocus />

<Component
  disabled
  hidden
  readOnly
/>

# Expression Attributes

<Component value={42} />

<Component handler={() => console.log('click')} />

<Component data={{ key: 'value', nested: { a: 1 } }} />

<Component items={[1, 2, 3]} />

<Component text={`template ${literal}`} />

<Component check={condition ? 'a' : 'b'} />

# Spread Attributes

<Component {...props} />

<Component {...{ a: 1, b: 2 }} />

<Component first="a" {...rest} last="z" />

# Mixed Attributes

<Component
  name="test"
  value={42}
  disabled
  {...extras}
  className="wrapper"
/>

# Edge Cases

<Component a="1" b='2' c={3} d />

<C x={fn({a: 1})} />
